recommendations.title: Floating Clouds
recommendations.overview: A married Japanese forester during WWII is sent to Indochina to manage forests. He meets a young Japanese typist and promises to leave his wife. He doesn't and after the war, she turns up and the affair resumes.

recommendations.title: The Blue Umbrella
recommendations.overview: It is just another evening commute until the rain starts to fall, and the city comes alive to the sound of dripping rain pipes, whistling awnings and gurgling gutters.

recommendations.title: Captain Fantastic
recommendations.overview: Deep in the forests of the Pacific Northwest, a father devoted to raising his six kids with a rigorous physical and intellectual education is forced to leave his paradise and enter the world, beginning a journey that challenges his idea of what it me

recommendations.title: Billionaire Boys Club
recommendations.overview: A group of wealthy boys in Los Angeles during the early 1980s establishes a get rich quick scam that turns deadly.

recommendations.title: House Party 2
recommendations.overview: Kid'N'Play leave their neighborhood and enter the world of adulthood and higher education. Play attempts to get rich quick in the music business while Kid faces the challenges of college.

recommendations.title: The Prize of Peril
recommendations.overview: In a futuristic society, contestants pit their survival skills against each other in a fight to the death for cash prizes, and the contest is aired live on television.

recommendations.title: The Girls
recommendations.overview: A graduate of the culinary technical school of the cook, Tosya Kislitsyna, a naive and eccentric girl, came to the village lost in the northern forests. She sticks her nose in all affairs, seeks to help everyone. She met Ilya on the day of arrival: t

recommendations.title: Away
recommendations.overview: After suffering a plane crash on a mysterious island, a young man embarks on an epic journey through forests, deserts and mountains trying to escape the shadow of a huge dark spirit.

recommendations.title: StreetDance 3D
recommendations.overview: In order to win the Street Dance Championships, a dance crew is forced to work with ballet dancers from the Royal Dance School in exchange for rehearsal space.

recommendations.title: Home Again
recommendations.overview: Life for a single mom in Los Angeles takes an unexpected turn when she allows three young guys to move in with her.
